expectations.evidence: No session opening — response jumps straight into generic data audit steps with no structured protocol
No phase table — response uses Step 1/2/3/4 headers for generic analysis steps unrelated to the AIOps session structure
No strategic objective question — instead makes assumptions ('I'd expect highest-value angle to be repeat incident reduction and L1 automation candidates')
Response immediately goes into analysis recommendations (Pareto on category+subcategory, MTTR by category, SLA breach rate) without waiting for any context
No explicit tooling choices; mentions generic tools (Python/pandas, Power BI) neutrally as optional
